arts.ttl: Oxford United v Leeds: Championship – live
arts.sum: Updates from the Kassam Stadium; kick-off 8pm BST Friday’s scores | Email Niall | Sign up for Football Daily Peep! Here we go, then. Leeds, making their first-ever visit to the Kassam Stadium, are in their navy third kit. Gary Rowett: “Having won against Sheffield United, another top, top team, it gives us confidence, but this is a very different test. It’s a question of ‘how do you stop them?’” On survival: “We’ll keep going until it’s done. We’ve come too far to let it slip now.” Continue reading...

arts.ttl: UPDATES: Oxford United v Leeds United – live
arts.sum: All the build-up, action and reaction as Oxford United host Leeds United in a Good Friday clash live on Sky Sports. Oxford United (19th) v Leeds United (2nd) Comment below or tweet @OxfordMailOUFC to get involved.

arts.ttl: Leeds United Championship promotion latest as Burnley result adds pre-Oxford twist
arts.sum: Before Leeds play Oxford, Sheffield United will take on Cardiff City and Bramall Lane in another game that is set to impact Leeds' promotion chances. What cushion Leeds will have in the two automatic promotion spots will depend on how Sheffield United get on against Cardiff later in the day.

arts.ttl: How to watch Oxford United vs Leeds United - TV channel, live stream details, kick-off time - Leeds Live
arts.sum: Leeds United can take a huge step towards promotion to the Premier League on Good Friday when they travel to Oxford United in the EFL Championship. How to live stream Oxford vs Leeds?

arts.ttl: Five Leeds United stars Daniel Farke must make decision on after Rasmus Kristensen transfer
arts.sum: That said, a number of players will return from loan spells in the summer, and decisions will need to be made on their long-term futures - whether that’s at Leeds or elsewhere. Midfielder Darko Gyabi, 21, came through the ranks at Millwall and then Manchester City before joining Leeds for a nominal fee in the summer of 2022.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Bristol City ace gets season-ending injury
arts.sum: Leeds United need seven points from their final four games of the season, with the final home test against Bristol City being a potentially vital encounter. However, when the Robins make their trek up to LS11 on that Monday night, they will have to do it without starting right midfielder Mark Sykes, who has suffered a quad injury that ends his season.

arts.ttl: Leeds United notebook - Owners’ meal at Elland Road and Whites represented in the NBA - Leeds Live
arts.sum: But Nance Jr has nevertheless been attending games to urge his team forward as they prepare for the play-offs, hence his presence in a Leeds shirt courtside this week. Larry Nance Jr, the Atalanta Hawks basketball player and 49ers Enterprises investor, has been seen sporting a number of retro Leeds United jerseys over the past week.

arts.ttl: Leeds United News: Chris Wilder gives Oxford United warning
arts.sum: One of their biggest results under Rowett came earlier this month when they beat Chris Wilder’s Sheffield United 1-0 thanks to Siriki Dembele’s first-half goal. Sheffield United’s Chris Wilder warns Leeds United of Oxford United’s threat

arts.ttl: I heard what Daniel Farke told reporters - it highlights Chris Wilder’s error
arts.sum: Daniel Farke half-joked after the draw with Luton Town that he was partly appointed as Leeds United manager to keep the cool amidst the emotion. He added: “Overall it's important in this hectic business, and especially when you play for such an emotional club like Leeds United, that you take the decisions not just out of the motions [sic] but more in an objective and neutral way.”

arts.ttl: Leeds United's transfer interest in Bundesliga star could spell trouble for Ilia Gruev
arts.sum: Leeds United know there's work still to be done this season but will have one eye on preparing for life in the Premier League next season with interest in Borussia Monchengladbach captain Julian Weigl. After arriving at the club in the summer of 2023 from Werder Bremen, Gruev has played 56 times for Leeds.
